headline: AI models unanimously bullish on SPY as market nears all-time highs
summary: All models predicted SPY would rise today, with targets clustering around $700 as the S&P 500 approaches record territory. Strong consensus also emerged for NVDA and AAPL moving higher, while XOM predictions were split between Claude's bearish oil-price concerns and Gemini/Grok's bullish energy sector outlook.

consensus_picks.note: Remarkable unanimity with all five models predicting SPY gains, targeting around $700.
Three models bullish on NVDA with AI demand and ASML's strong results as key catalysts.
Mixed signals with Gemini bearish on supply chain issues while Grok and Perplexity see upside.
Claude sees oil price weakness from Iran talks while Gemini expects energy sector strength.

best_call.summary: Results pending - market has not closed yet.
